title: Filter using same field in OR and AND throws typeexception
poc: create table "simple" (id int,field1 int, field2 int);
select * from "simple" where field1 = 1 and (field1 = 1 or field2 = 1);
select * from "simple" where field1 = 1 and (field2 = 1 or field1 = 1 or field2 = 2);
key_bug_features: Using same field in OR and AND conditions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "complex" (id int PRIMARY KEY, field1 int NOT NULL, field2 int DEFAULT 0, field3 varchar(50));
INSERT INTO "complex" (id, field1, field2, field3) VALUES (1, 1, 2, 'test1');
INSERT INTO "complex" (id, field1, field2, field3) VALUES (2, 1, NULL, 'test2');
SELECT * FROM "complex" WHERE field1 = 1 AND (field1 = 1 OR field2 = 2);
SELECT * FROM "complex" WHERE field1 = 1 AND (field2 = 1 OR field1 = 1 OR field3 IS NULL);
